entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a legume crop affected by bacterial wilt in Asia.

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A production constraint disease caused by Ralstonia solanacearum.

entities.name: RALSTONIA SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen responsible for causing bacterial wilt in groundnut.

entities.name: INDONESIA
entities.description: The country where the bacterial wilt endemic areas and the study were located.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where groundnut production is constrained by bacterial wilt.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The measure of groundnut production, expressed in t ha-1.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars or lines to withstand infection by Ralstonia solanacearum.

entities.name: YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of pod yield and resistance across different endemic locations.

entities.name: PLANT WILT INTENSITY
entities.description: A measure used to indicate the severity of the bacterial wilt disease incidence.

entities.name: GAJAH
entities.description: An improved groundnut cultivar that exhibited stable resistance to bacterial wilt.

entities.name: MLGG 0627
entities.description: A susceptible check groundnut cultivar used in the study.

entities.name: CHIIC-8
entities.description: A breeding line that exhibited high pod yield potential.

entities.name: LPTR-12
entities.description: A breeding line that exhibited high pod yield potential.
